meta.title: Susee Homes | Build Your Future
meta.description: Susee Homes — Premium plotted developments and custom home construction in Chennai's fastest-growing corridor.

hero.tagline: Built on trust. Designed for life.

stages.headline:
ALIGHT —
your next chapter

stages.sub: 2 min from Kuthambakkam · Metro-ready corridor · Book your site visit today.

pillars.heading:
Not just the land —
we build the home too.
pillars.sub: Susee Homes delivers both under one roof — premium land and the expertise to build on it.

cards.title: Plotted Developments
cards.body: DTCP-approved and RERA-certified layouts with clear documentation, full infrastructure — roads, drainage, electricity — and transparent pricing. Buy your land with complete legal confidence.

cards.title: Custom Home Construction
cards.body: Our in-house construction team designs and builds your home on your plot, end-to-end. From architectural concept to handover, every detail is handled by a single trusted partner.

process.heading:
Four steps to
your new home.

steps.title: Choose Your Plot
steps.body: Browse available plots with clear pricing, documentation, and site visit appointments.

steps.title: Design Your Home
steps.body: Work with our architects to design a home that fits your lifestyle and plot dimensions.

steps.title: We Build It
steps.body: Our construction team handles everything — materials, labour, timelines, and quality checks.

steps.title: Move In
steps.body: Receive your keys. We hand over a fully finished home with all utilities connected.

alight.heading:
Project ALIGHT
Poonamallee, Chennai
alight.body: ALIGHT is a premium plotted development at the heart of Chennai's fastest-growing corridor. Located moments from Kuthambakkam, Nazarathpet Metro, and Poonamallee, it offers the ideal combination of connectivity, serenity, and strong investment potential.

estimator.heading:
Describe your
dream home.
estimator.sub: Type what you want — bedrooms, size, style, floors — in plain English (or Tamil). We'll parse it instantly and give you a ball-park build estimate.
examples: 3 BHK modern home, 1800 sqft, ground floor
estimator.placeholder: e.g. I want a 3 BHK modern home, around 1800 sqft, ground floor only, with an open kitchen...
estimator.empty: Start typing above and your instant estimate will appear here.

upcoming.heading:
More landmark
developments coming.
upcoming.intro: Three new landmark developments are entering the Susee pipeline across Chennai's growth corridor — each held to the same standard of clear title, full infrastructure and transparent pricing.
upcoming.hint: Tap a plate to open the record

founder.heading:
Two decades.
One promise.
founder.name: Mr. Rajesh BR
founder.quote: I don't sell land. I lay the foundation for someone's dream.
founder.bio1: I started Susee Homes in 2004 with one conviction: that a family's biggest financial decision deserves complete transparency. No hidden charges, no inflated promises — just clean title, full infrastructure, and a builder who answers your call. Twenty years later, that's still the only way I know how to do this.
founder.bio2: Project ALIGHT is the most carefully planned work of my career — a 6.72-acre master community where every detail, from the road widths to the open-space ratio, was decided with one question in mind: would I want my own family to live here?

milestones.label: Founded Susee Homes
milestones.sub: Started with a single plot layout in Koyambedu

milestones.label: 100 families housed
milestones.sub: Expanded to North Chennai and Poonamallee belt

milestones.label: Construction arm launched
milestones.sub: End-to-end home building added to the portfolio

items.quote: Every document they promised was on the table before I paid a single rupee. Patta, EC, approved layout — all of it. That's when I knew this was different.
items.name: R. Karthikeyan

items.quote: We visited on a Sunday, and Mr. Rajesh himself walked us through the layout. No pressure, no countdown offers. Just the land, the papers, and honest answers.
items.name: S. Priya Dharshini

items.quote: They built our house on the plot they sold us — one team from registration to keys. The milestone payments meant we always knew exactly where our money went.
items.name: Anand & Revathi

items.quote: I compared six layouts in this corridor before choosing ALIGHT. Nothing else came close on documentation clarity and the width of the internal roads.
items.name: M. Ilangovan

items.q: Is Project ALIGHT DTCP approved and RERA registered?
items.a: Yes. ALIGHT is fully DTCP-approved and RERA-certified. Every plot carries clear title documentation, and we share all approvals — layout sanction, patta, and encumbrance certificate — before you commit to anything.

The layout offers 181 individual plots ranging from 627 to 2,259 sq ft, including Vastu-compliant orientations. Our team will walk you through available plots, corner positions, and road-facing options during your site visit.

items.q: Can Susee Homes also build my house?
items.a: Yes — that's our second pillar. Our in-house construction arm handles everything from architectural design to handover: materials, labour, timelines, and quality checks, with a dedicated project manager and milestone-based payments.

You receive the complete legal set: mother document copies, DTCP-approved layout plan, patta transfer, up-to-date encumbrance certificate, and your registered sale deed. We believe a family's biggest financial decision deserves complete transparency.

Plot purchases follow transparent, published pricing — no hidden charges. Construction contracts are milestone-based: you pay as each stage completes, from foundation to finishing, and every stage is documented.

items.q: How do I book a site visit?
items.a: Message us on WhatsApp or call +91 96268 55553. Our team arranges private site visits every day of the week — the site is just 2 minutes from Kuthambakkam on the metro-ready Poonamallee corridor.

Visit the site today.
